next_steps: Obtain serum levels of Vitamin A (retinol), Vitamin B12, folate, copper, zinc, and Vitamin E
Urgent ophthalmology consultation for formal assessment and electroretinography
Dietary evaluation by a pediatric nutritionist
Initiate empiric high-dose Vitamin A supplementation
Consider genetic testing for hereditary optic neuropathies
Perform comprehensive neurological assessment and metabolic screen
Referral to low-vision rehabilitation and behavioral support services
